title: Suki Feels the Wind
synopsis: Little Suki explores different feelings as she experiences the wind outdoors, from gentle breezes that make her happy to stronger gusts that surprise her, learning that all feelings are okay.

illustration.description: A cheerful toddler girl named Suki with dark hair in small ponytails, wearing a bright yellow dress, standing in a sunny garden with her arms outstretched. Her face shows pure joy with a wide smile and sparkling eyes. Soft green grass surrounds her with colorful flowers swaying gently. Warm pastels dominate the scene with high contrast between Suki's bright clothing and the soft background.
illustration.alt: Happy toddler Suki with arms spread wide in a sunny garden

pages.text: Wind makes whoosh sounds. Suki giggles!

illustration.description: Suki laughing with delight as gentle wind blows through her hair and dress. Pink cherry blossom petals float around her in soft swirls. Her expression shows pure happiness with rosy cheeks and bright eyes. A diverse group of children play in the background - a boy with curly red hair and a girl with braids. Soft pink and yellow tones create a warm, joyful atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Suki giggling as wind blows flower petals around her

illustration.description: Suki's eyes widen with surprise as a stronger gust of wind blows her hair back and makes her dress flutter dramatically. Her expression shows mild surprise but not fear - eyebrows raised and mouth forming a small 'o'. The background shows swaying trees and scattered leaves in motion. Colors shift to slightly cooler blues and greens while maintaining the gentle, safe feeling.
illustration.alt: Surprised Suki as stronger wind blows around her

illustration.description: Close-up of Suki's face showing wonder and surprise with wide, bright eyes and slightly open mouth. Her dark hair is tousled by the wind. In the background, an elderly grandmother with silver hair and kind eyes watches protectively, and a father figure with warm brown skin tends to a garden. Soft lavender and cream colors create a comforting mood despite the surprise.
illustration.alt: Close-up of Suki's surprised but curious expression

illustration.description: Suki standing peacefully in the now-still garden, her hair and dress settled. Her expression is calm and content with a gentle smile. Everything around her is peaceful - flowers stand upright, leaves are still, and butterflies hover nearby. Soft, muted pastels in cream, sage green, and pale yellow create a serene, restful atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Peaceful Suki in a calm, still garden

illustration.description: Suki sitting cross-legged on soft grass with a content, peaceful expression, eyes half-closed in relaxation. Her hands rest gently on her knees. Around her, a diverse family group - including her mother with long black hair, a sibling, and neighbors of various ethnicities - all share the quiet moment. Warm, golden afternoon light bathes everyone in soft, comforting tones.
illustration.alt: Content Suki sitting peacefully with family around her

illustration.description: Suki's face lights up with recognition and joy as a gentle breeze returns, barely moving her hair. Her expression shows happy anticipation with bright eyes and a growing smile. Dandelion seeds float lazily in the air around her. A young boy with glasses and a girl with natural curls play nearby. Soft yellows and greens return, suggesting the cycle continues.
illustration.alt: Delighted Suki as gentle breeze returns with floating dandelion seeds

pages.text: All feelings are okay. Suki knows.

illustration.description: Suki walking confidently through the garden with a wise, knowing smile on her face. Her posture shows self-assurance and acceptance. Around her, other children of different ethnicities experience various emotions - one laughing, one looking thoughtful, one appearing sleepy. The illustration uses a full spectrum of gentle pastels to represent the range of feelings, all harmonious together.
illustration.alt: Confident Suki walking through garden with diverse children showing different emotions

pages.text: Whoosh goes the wind. Suki smiles.

illustration.description: Final image of Suki with arms raised in celebration, hair and dress flowing in a gentle breeze, wearing the biggest, most confident smile. She's surrounded by her diverse community - family members and friends of all ages and backgrounds, all enjoying the wind together. The scene bursts with warm, joyful colors and shows the beauty of experiencing feelings together with loved ones.
illustration.alt: Joyful Suki with arms raised, surrounded by diverse community enjoying the wind

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the wind make?
questions.explanation: The wind makes a 'whoosh' sound throughout Suki's adventure!

questions.question: How does Suki feel when the big wind comes?
questions.explanation: Suki feels surprised when the big wind comes - and that's perfectly okay!

questions.question: What does Suki learn about feelings?
questions.explanation: Suki learns that all feelings are okay - happy, surprised, and calm!
